context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 142 verifies: (1) PDF Section 04 MATERIALI E INTERVENTI is REMOVED - materiali_suggeriti data exists but is NOT rendered in PDF, (2) PDF variant boxes do NOT show tempo_stimato/Tempi Previsti - only Costo Stimato (IVA escl.), (3) Frontend has editable variant prices via data-testid='variant-{A|B|C}-price', (4) Frontend has add/remove item buttons via data-testid='variant-{A|B|C}-add-item', (5) Email endpoint POST /api/sopralluoghi/{id}/invia-email validates client email and AI analysis before sending, (6) genera-preventivo uses preventivo_id (prev_xxx) not quote_id. Key files: pdf_perizia_sopralluogo.py (lines 560-662), sopralluogo.py (lines 434, 570-648), SopralluogoWizardPage.js (lines 800-985).

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email via Resend - actual send requires RESEND_API_KEY to be valid. The endpoint logic and validation is testable.
